title: verbena urticifolia var. riparia
intro: Verbena urticifolia var. riparia, also known as the tall verbena or riparian verbena, is a perennial plant belonging to the verbena family (Verbenaceae) and native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, cuts, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Verbena urticifolia var. riparia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antimicrobial agent. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
